nasb.text: “How beautiful are your feet in sandals, O prince’s daughter! The curves of your hips are like jewels, The work of the hands of an artist.

esv.text: How beautiful are your feet in sandals, O noble daughter! Your rounded thighs are like jewels, the work of a master hand.

cnv.text: 王女啊！ 你的腳在鞋中多麼美麗； 你大腿的曲線美如珠玉， 是巧匠手裡的傑作。

ccb.text: 我的公主啊，你的双脚配上鞋子多么美啊！ 你美玉般圆润的腿是巧匠的杰作。
